## Checklist

- [ ] `make clean && make && make test` passes (60 tests green)
- [ ] No credentials, account numbers, or PII in the diff
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if user-facing change)
- [ ] New env vars documented in README.md (if applicable)
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and imperative ("fix X", "add Y", not "fixed X" or "WIP")
